signUpToAcceptInvite: Ka shiga/yi rajista don karɓar gayyatar
clickToAcceptAs: Danna maɓallin da ke ƙasa don karɓar gayyatar a matsayin {{email}}
acceptInviteError: An samu matsala wajen karɓar gayyatar
acceptInviteWithDifferentAccount: Kana son karɓar gayyatar da wani asusu daban?
alreadyHaveAccountStatement: Ina da asusu, ina son in shiga maimakon
doNotHaveAccountStatement: Ba ni da asusu, ina son in yi rajista maimakon
passwordResetSubheading: Shigar da adireshin imel ɗinka a ƙasa. Za ka samu hanyar haɗi don sake saita kalmar sirrinka.
passwordResetSuccessMessage: Duba akwatin imel ɗinka! Mun aiko maka hanyar haɗi don sake saita kalmar sirrinka.
passwordLengthError: Ka samar da kalmar sirri mai aƙalla haruffa 6
sendLinkSuccessDescription: Duba imel ɗinka, mun aiko maka hanyar haɗi. Bi ta don shiga.
sendLinkSuccess: Mun aiko maka hanyar haɗi ta imel
sendLinkSuccessToast: An aika hanyar haɗi cikin nasara
verificationCodeHint: Shigar da lambar da muka aiko maka ta SMS
sendMfaCodeError: Yi haƙuri, ba mu iya aiko maka lambar tabbatarwa ba
verifyMfaCodeSuccess: An tabbatar da lamba! Ana shigar da kai...
verifyMfaCodeError: Kai! Da alama lambar ba daidai ba ce
reauthenticateDescription: Saboda dalilai na tsaro, muna buƙatar ka sake tabbatar da kanka
errorAlertHeading: Yi haƙuri, ba mu iya tabbatar da kai ba
emailConfirmationAlertHeading: Mun aiko maka imel na tabbatarwa.
emailConfirmationAlertBody: Barka da zuwa! Ka duba imel ɗinka ka danna hanyar haɗin don tabbatar da asusunka.
resendLinkSuccessDescription: Mun aiko maka sabuwar hanyar haɗi ta imel! Bi ta don shiga.
authenticationErrorAlertBody: Yi haƙuri, ba mu iya tabbatar da kai ba. Sake gwadawa.
resetPasswordError: Yi haƙuri, ba mu iya sake saita kalmar sirrinka ba. Sake gwadawa.
inviteAlertHeading: An gayyace ka ka shiga ƙungiya
inviteAlertBody: Ka shiga ko yi rajista don karɓar gayyatar da shiga ƙungiyar.

errors.Invalid login credentials: Bayanan shiga da ka shigar ba daidai ba ne
errors.User already registered: An riga an yi amfani da wannan bayani. Ka gwada wani.
errors.Email not confirmed: Ka tabbatar da adireshin imel ɗinka kafin ka shiga
errors.default: Mun samu matsala. Tabbatar kana da haɗin yanar gizo mai aiki ka sake gwadawa
errors.generic: Yi haƙuri, ba mu iya tabbatar da kai ba. Sake gwadawa.
errors.link: Yi haƙuri, mun samu matsala wajen aika hanyar haɗinka. Sake gwadawa.
errors.codeVerifierMismatch: Da alama kana ƙoƙarin shiga da wani burauza daban da wanda ka yi amfani da shi wajen neman hanyar haɗin shiga. Sake gwadawa da burauza ɗaya.
errors.minPasswordLength: Kalmar sirri dole ta kasance aƙalla haruffa 8
errors.passwordsDoNotMatch: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba
errors.minPasswordNumbers: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla lamba ɗaya
errors.minPasswordSpecialChars: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla alama ɗaya ta musamman
errors.uppercasePassword: Kalmar sirri dole ta ƙunshi aƙalla babban harafi ɗaya
errors.insufficient_aal: Ka shiga da tabbatarwa ta matakai da yawa na yanzu don aiwatar da wannan aiki
errors.otp_expired: Hanyar haɗin imel ɗin ta ƙare. Sake gwadawa.
